markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX) and Jordan Ormont (Menlo Ventures) to discuss Marcel's background, GrowthX, and potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel has extensive experience in marketing/growth for tech companies, including IBM, HP, HashiCorp, and Scale.ai](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai, founded by Marcel, has reached $11M run rate in \~1 year, offering AI-powered organic growth solutions](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Jordan, as Talent Partner at Menlo Ventures, provides hands-on support in executive hiring and team building for portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Both discussed the evolving landscape of remote work and its impact on talent acquisition and retention in tech](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Career Journey

  - [Started at IBM and HP, building organic growth engines and high-ROI marketing initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Held leadership roles at HashiCorp (6M to 100M ARR), ServiceTitan, and Scale.ai (100M to 300M ARR in 2 years)](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Founded GrowthX.ai in 2022, reaching $11M run rate and $9.3-9.4M ARR within a year](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

### GrowthX.ai Overview

  - [Offers AI-powered organic growth solutions, focusing on content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Team of \~70 people (30 on build side, 40 on delivery side) across 22 countries](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Notable clients include Ramp (800+ pages published), Anthropic, and Cursor](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Average deal size \~$200K, often closed within 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)

### Menlo Ventures' Approach to Talent

  - [Jordan leads talent acquisition and executive hiring for portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)
  - [Provides hands-on support in team building, board member placement, and CEO coaching](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [Works closely with founders on go-to-market hiring (sales, marketing, CRO roles)](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)
  - [Leverages both internal network and external search firms for executive placements](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)

### Remote Work Discussion

  - [Both discussed pros and cons of remote-first vs. office-based approaches](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Marcel advocates for remote-first with periodic in-person meetings and offsites](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Jordan noted the importance of in-office presence for relationship building, especially for younger employees](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to consider engaging a CEO coach to support his leadership development](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=2128.0)
  - [Potential future collaboration on executive hiring as GrowthX scales](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)
  - [Marcel to keep Jordan updated on GrowthX's progress and any arising needs](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=2279.0)
  - [Explore possibility of in-person meeting in the future](https://fathom.video/share/FikC3Zfe3esVpBmT2T-C-uKTvNpsK3R4?tab=summary&timestamp=2288.0)
